title: Via Klasfeld:... - Random stuff - Fedia
text:
[GottaLaff],Via Klasfeld:
A federal judge throws down the gauntlet on Rudy
[#Giuliani]'s "noncompliance."Under "pain of contempt," Giuliani must meet December deadlines for turning over property in storage facilities to Georgia election workers Shaye Moss and Ruby Freeman, he rules.
[mattblaze],
[@GottaLaff]Let me just take this as an opportunity to remind everyone that Shaye Moss and Ruby Freeman are ground-level civil servants whose lives were ruined for no reason other than to allow Giuliani to advance completely fabricated claims of fraud that he knew from the beginning were false.This is not about delaying a fine to the government. This is about his active avoidance of paying what he owes to these two women whose lives he endangered and upended.
[mattblaze],
[@GottaLaff]Which is to say, Rudy Giuliani is a horrible, horrible man.
[GottaLaff]OP ,
[@mattblaze]I've NEVER understood that whole adoration, "America's Mayor" thing. He has always been just awful.
[aeisenberg],
[@mattblaze][@GottaLaff]I lived in NYC for most of the 90s. You’re right. He was always awful.
[mattblaze],
[@GottaLaff]Everyone thought he was "America's Mayor" except the people he was actually mayor of.
[dannotdaniel],
[@mattblaze][@GottaLaff]Jim Comey even had some wordsapparently Rudy was a shit boss, too
[VATVSLPR],
[@mattblaze][@GottaLaff]
He spent his time as America's Mayor rather than New York's mayor. Surprise, surprise! New Yorkers want a mayor who's going to focus on them, not the rest of the country. It's his whole career in a nutshell: he saw every job as a path to the next job rather than something worth doing on its own merits.
[blogdiva],🗣️ 📣 LOUDER FOR THE PEOPLE IN THE BACK!!!
[aka_quant_noir],And horrible people should pay when they endanger others.
[GottaLaff]OP ,
[@mattblaze]Standing O, Matt.
[heidilifeldman],
[Arqtec]Bot ,Might be a real Danger of this Judgement being Shit Canned
Trump is still asserting that he won in 2020
If he bends the Law to his Favor ?
Ole Rudy just may get his delay, and as time passes, A Medal of Freedom Award and finally a judgement denied or reduced to near nothing.
Donald is still The Dude that denied Black people a place to live, so denying a money settlement is in his BRAIN ALREADY
94 million people NOT voting gave this guy POWER, A Criminal Felon, POWER
[spocko],
[@mattblaze]Thank you for that COMMENT!. We need to keep the focus of the real victims. Here is a graphic I made of Rudy's active avoidance & legal f*ckery around hthe assets he has NOT turned over.
Also, here's my article about why we have to keep fighting them outside the court when we WIN in court.
[https://digbysblog.net/2024/11/18/rules-for-fighting-and-winning-this-century/]
[@GottaLaff]
[Stinson_108],Why should
[#Giuliani]cooperate? After he does, he'll be homeless anyway. If the judge gives him thirty days for contempt, that's three hots and a cot.
[DRBLD2009],
[@GottaLaff]Trump will take care of him..
